prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

you need to do ALL of these, each one gets its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

the copy should be compelling, on-brand, and like actually production ready

use all your tools to get this done. do everything, don't skip anything. i want to see every single file written. make sure it's thorough and complete

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content:
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that adapts to your workday.

Paragraph 1: From early-morning focus to late-night wind‑down, Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness to match the moment. It learns from time of day, your calendar, and the light already in your room—so your workspace always feels just right.

Paragraph 2: No more fiddling with settings or working under harsh light. Lumina delivers comfortable, eye‑friendly illumination that supports productivity and wellness for remote work. Plug it in, connect once, and it just works.

Paragraph 3: At $149, Lumina brings premium adaptive lighting within reach—designed for how you actually work, wherever you work.

Email 1 — Launch Day
Subject: Meet Lumina: light that knows your day

Hi there,

Remote work isn’t one-size-fits-all—your lighting shouldn’t be either. Today we’re launching Lumina, the smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and the light already in your room.

That means focus-ready light for deep work, warmer tones for late afternoons, and a softer glow when it’s time to unwind. No more manual tweaks, no more eye strain—just lighting that adapts to your life.

Lumina is available now for $149.

→ Get Lumina today

—The Lumina Team


Email 2 — Two Days Later
Subject: The simplest way to upgrade your workspace

Hi there,

Your workspace has to do a lot—meetings, deep work, creative sprints, and everything in between. Lumina makes it effortless by syncing to your schedule and surroundings.

• Adapts to time of day for natural rhythm
• Reads your calendar for smart shifts
• Balances ambient room light for comfort

The result: a workspace that feels calmer, more focused, and easier on your eyes. Setup takes minutes, and after that, it just works.

Ready to upgrade your desk?

→ Shop Lumina for $149

—The Lumina Team


Email 3 — One Week Later
Subject: Last chance for launch-week availability

Hi there,

Lumina has been lighting up remote workspaces all week—and our first production run is moving fast. If you’ve been thinking about it, now’s the time to make the switch.

Get adaptive lighting designed for real workdays: automatic adjustments, comfortable light, and a clean, modern design that fits any desk.

Stock is limited from the launch batch.

→ Claim your Lumina

Thanks for supporting a smarter workday,
—The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Introducing Lumina: the smart desk lamp that adjusts brightness + color temp based on time of day, your calendar, and room light. No more fiddling—just light that knows your day. $149. ✨
2) Remote work glow-up: Lumina delivers eye‑friendly light that adapts automatically—focus in the AM, warm down at night. Designed for how you actually work.

Instagram
1) Your desk light should keep up with your day. Lumina adapts to time, calendar, and ambient light—so it always feels just right. 💡 #RemoteWork #HomeOffice
2) Focus early. Soft glow late. Lumina does it all automatically. Meet the smart lamp made for modern workspaces. $149.

LinkedIn
1) Today we’re launching Lumina, a smart desk lamp built for remote workers. It adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—helping reduce eye strain and improve focus. Now available for $149.
2) Lighting impacts productivity more than we think. Lumina brings adaptive, intelligent light to the home office so your workspace supports your schedule—not the other way around. Available now.

HERO
Headline: Light that adapts to your workday.
Subhead: Lumina is a smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room lighting.
CTA Button: Get Lumina for $149

WHY LUMINA
Designed for how you actually work
Your day shifts constantly—meetings, deep work, and late-night catch‑ups. Lumina keeps your lighting perfectly tuned without you lifting a finger.

FEATURES
1) Time‑of‑day tuning
Cool, focused light in the morning. Warmer, relaxed tones in the evening. Lumina aligns with your natural rhythm.

2) Calendar‑aware adjustments
Heading into a meeting or a presentation? Lumina automatically shifts to the right lighting for the moment.

3) Ambient light balancing
Lumina senses the light in your room and balances it for consistent, comfortable illumination.

4) Eye‑friendly illumination
Reduce glare and eye strain with light that’s tailored to your space and schedule.

5) Simple setup, effortless use
Connect once, set preferences, and Lumina handles the rest.

TESTIMONIALS
“[Customer Quote Placeholder]” — Name, Role
“[Customer Quote Placeholder]” — Name, Role
“[Customer Quote Placeholder]” — Name, Role

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to adjust the light?
Lumina uses time of day, your connected calendar, and ambient light sensors to make automatic adjustments.

2) Do I have to manually change settings?
No. After setup, Lumina runs automatically. You can always override settings if you want.

3) What calendars are supported?
Lumina supports major calendar platforms such as Google Calendar and Outlook.

4) Does Lumina work in rooms with natural light?
Yes. Lumina balances its output based on the light already in your room.

5) Is Lumina suitable for late‑night work?
Absolutely. Lumina shifts to warmer, lower‑intensity light to reduce eye strain at night.

6) What’s included in the box?
Lumina lamp, power adapter, quick‑start guide.

FINAL CTA
Bring adaptive lighting to your desk.
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday

SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, 2025] — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed specifically for remote workers. Priced at $149, Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to create a more comfortable and productive workspace.

Remote work has made the home office a daily destination, but most lighting solutions still require manual adjustments and create unnecessary eye strain. Lumina brings an “it just works” lighting experience to the modern desk by syncing to a user’s schedule and environment. The result is lighting that feels natural throughout the day, from morning focus to evening wind‑down.

“Lighting has a direct impact on how we feel and perform at work,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to remove the friction—so your lighting supports your day automatically, without another setting to manage.”

Key features include:
• Automatic time‑of‑day tuning for natural rhythms
• Calendar‑aware adjustments for meetings and focus blocks
• Ambient light sensing for consistent comfort
• Eye‑friendly illumination designed to reduce strain
• Simple setup with effortless daily use

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website URL].

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting for modern workspaces. With a focus on comfort, productivity, and simplicity, Lumina designs products that adapt to how people actually work. Learn more at [website URL].

steps.text:
All files are written. Here’s what I created:

- `tagline.txt`
- `hero-copy.txt`
- `email-sequence.txt`
- `social-posts.txt`
- `landing-page.txt`
- `press-release.txt`

If you want any tweaks (voice, length, channel-specific variations, or added visuals/CTAs), just say the word.
